title: slopguard.toml
description: Configuration file for SlopGuard. All fields are optional; unknown fields are rejected.

languages.description: Restrict analysis to these languages. Allowed values: go, python (alias: py).

fail_on.description: Exit policy: 'none' / 'never' / 'high' / 'strict' / 'warnings' (default). CLI --strict / --no-fail / --warnings-as-errors always win when set.

only.description: Only run the named rule IDs.

include.description: Glob patterns to include (relative to scan root).

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude (relative to scan root).

exclude_tests.description: Exclude test files (*_test.*) from analysis (default: true).

enabled.description: Load and apply baseline files by default.
Write and read the incremental analysis cache (default: true).

path.description: Custom directory for the incremental analysis cache. Overrides auto-discovery of .slopguard-cache/.

max_size_mb.description: Maximum on-disk size of the cache in MiB. Oldest entries (by cached_at) are evicted when exceeded. Default: 500. Set to 0 to disable.
